content:
🌟 mgrep | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a natural language interface for searching and retrieving information from local files and the web, particularly useful for developers and AI agents.
✨ Key Features: • Natural-language search • Semantic, multilingual, and multimodal search capabilities • Built-in web search (--web) • Background indexing with `mgrep watch` • Friendly device-login flow
📖 Summary: mgrep is a command-line tool that enables semantic searching across various file types, including code, text, and PDFs, using natural language queries. It features background indexing, web search integration, and is designed for both human and agent use, aiming to reduce token usage for AI agents.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
